The "'''''Mos Eisley Adventure Set'''''" was a roleplaying supplement for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] published by [[West End Games]] (WEG). The 32-page set was designed to be a guide to the hazards and opportunities player characters could find in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], including adventures, characters, and locations to explore. The set included a variety of material, including West End Games' ''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''. It includes five miniatures as well as [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] era adventure hooks. The full publishing name is the Mos Eisley Miniatures Box Set, since it contained twelve metal miniatures for play with the game and a six-sided die. Also included was a full-color map of Mos Eisley.

==Contents==
*"[[Vested Interest]]"
*"[[There's Many a Slip Betwixt Cup and Lip]]"
*"[[Harvest Day (adventure)|Harvest Day]]"
*"[[The Passage From Perdition]]"
*"[[A Line in the Sand...]]"
